reports.title: UI-TARS-desktop
reports.summary: 字节跳动开源的多模态AI Agent框架，支持视觉理解与桌面GUI全自动化操作
reports.content: The Open-Source Multimodal AI Agent Framework for Desktop GUI Automation. Built with TypeScript, supporting visual understanding and automated desktop operations.

reports.title: DeepSeek-TUI
reports.summary: Rust打造的终端原生AI编程助手，支持MCP协议、1M上下文、自动模式选择和LSP诊断
reports.content: DeepSeek TUI - Terminal-native AI coding assistant built with Rust. Supports MCP protocol, 1M context, automatic mode selection, LSP diagnostics, multi-provider support, Skills system, and session management.

reports.title: financial-services
reports.summary: Anthropic发布的金融服务领域AI Agent示例，用于投资银行、私募股权、财富管理等场景
